section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an interpretive summary of a vital sign rather than the raw measured value; it functions more as assessment of control than an objective measurement, though it does not substantially mislead.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's blood sugars have been elevated.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a characterization of home blood sugar readings, which are patient-reported subjective data rather than a synthesized diagnostic impression.

The note already states that the hemoglobin A1c level is pending in the Objective section, indicating the test has been ordered/performed; repeating it as a new order in the Plan is inconsistent and could mislead about the timing/status of the test.
